author: snehar-nd
message:
fix: add persistent CTI listener to multi-role-screen for transfer gap
    
    The RedirectToDashboardComponent creates an async routing gap where
    innerpage ngOnDestroy removes the window listener and dashboard ngOnInit
    has not yet called addListener(). CTI Accept events for the 2nd call
    fire during this gap and are lost — session storage confirms no
    pending_session_id is stored when the transfer dialog shows.
    
    multi-role-screen is the only component that is never destroyed between
    route changes. Adding the window listener there ensures every Accept is
    caught regardless of which route is currently active:
    - Agent free/transitioning: navigate directly to innerpage
    - Agent on call (isOnCall=yes): store pending_session_id for dashboard
      ngOnInit to pick up after the call is closed
    
    Also remove the || isAcceptEvent bypass in dashboard.listener() so the
    dashboard does not issue a duplicate router.navigate when multi-role-screen
    already set session_id for the same Accept event.
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
